ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played (e.g., 1b, ss, rf) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, traded) */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Bats left, right, or both */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throws left or right */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's salary */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who played */,
  "AB" INTEGER /* At-bats during the game */,
  "R" INTEGER /* Runs scored during the game */,
  "H" INTEGER /* Hits made during the game */,
  "RBI" INTEGER /* Runs batted in during the game */,
  "BB" INTEGER /* Walks obtained during the game */,
  "SO" INTEGER /* Strikeouts recorded during the game */,
  "LOB" INTEGER /* Left on base during the game */,
  "IP" REAL /* Innings pitched during the game */,
  "ER" INTEGER /* Earned runs given up during the game */,
  "HR" INTEGER /* Home runs allowed during the game */,
  "HBP" INTEGER /* Hit by pitches during the game */,
  "PUTOUTS" INTEGER /* Total putouts made during the game */,
  "ASSISTS" INTEGER /* Total assists made during the game */,
  "ERRORS" INTEGER /* Total errors made during the game */,
  "DOUBLE_PLAYS" INTEGER /* Total double plays turned during the game */,
  "GAME_TYPE" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams the coach has worked for */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements or awards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injured player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the injury */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the injury (if applicable) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "recovery_plan" TEXT /* Plan for recovery and rehabilitation */,
  "physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician treating the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being scouted */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scout who created the report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  "report" TEXT /* Content of the scouting report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game during which the report was made */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Player's status at the time of the report (e.g., active, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_scout_id FOREIGN KEY ("scout_id") REFERENCES scouts ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the scout belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of scouting experience */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the scout */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scout */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., hitting, pitching, fielding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season stat record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the stats belong to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the stats are aggregated */,
  "total_AB" INTEGER /* Total at-bats for the season */,
  "total_R" INTEGER /* Total runs scored for the season */,
  "total_H" INTEGER /* Total hits made for the season */,
  "total_RBI" INTEGER /* Total RBIs for the season */,
  "total_BB" INTEGER /* Total walks for the season */,
  "total_SO" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts for the season */,
  "total_LOB" INTEGER /* Total left on base for the season */,
  "total_IP" REAL /* Total innings pitched for the season */,
  "total_ER" INTEGER /* Total earned runs given up for the season */,
  "total_HR" INTEGER /* Total home runs allowed for the season */,
  "total_HBP" INTEGER /* Total hit by pitches for the season */,
  "total_PUTOUTS" INTEGER /* Total putouts made for the season */,
  "total_ASSISTS" INTEGER /* Total assists made for the season */,
  "total_ERRORS" INTEGER /* Total errors made for the season */,
  "total_DOUBLE_PLAYS" INTEGER /* Total double plays turned for the season */,
  "GAME_TYPE" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
